_template_instructions.purpose: Assess severity and probability for hazards identified during extraction
_template_instructions.when_to_fill: After gap analysis identifies hazards needing clinical assessment
_template_instructions.how_to_use: 1. Copy to Output/<system>/system/defined/hazard-assessments.json, 2. Assess each hazard, 3. Remove _template_instructions
_template_instructions.notes: Severity and probability should be assessed by someone with clinical domain knowledge

hazard_assessments._instructions: Copy this block for each hazard identified in extractions

clinical_context.clinical_scenario: <FILL: describe realistic scenario where this hazard leads to harm>

harm_analysis.harm_mechanism: <FILL: how does the hazard lead to harm>

severity_assessment.most_likely_harm: <FILL: most probable outcome if hazard occurs>

initial_risk_evaluation.calculation: <FILL: e.g., S3 x P3 = ALARP per risk matrix>

residual_risk_evaluation.calculation: <FILL: e.g., S3 x P2 = acceptable per risk matrix>

benefit_risk_analysis._instructions: Complete only if residual_risk_level is ALARP
benefit_risk_analysis.clinical_benefit: <FILL: what benefit does this functionality provide>
benefit_risk_analysis.disclosure_text: <FILL: text to include in IFU if disclosure required>

controls_proposed.expected_effectiveness: <FILL: how much will this reduce risk>

example_completed_assessment._note: This is an example - delete when using template

clinical_context.clinical_scenario: Practitioner initiates handover to a colleague who is unavailable (on leave, off shift). Patient care responsibility becomes unclear, leading to delayed follow-up.

harm_analysis.potential_harm: Delayed patient care due to unclear responsibility
harm_analysis.harm_mechanism: Patient falls through the cracks - original practitioner thinks handover complete, target practitioner unaware
harm_analysis.patient_population_at_risk: Patients requiring continuity of care, especially those with ongoing conditions

severity_assessment.rationale: Delay in care could require additional medical intervention to address worsened condition
severity_assessment.most_likely_harm: Delayed follow-up causing discomfort and anxiety

probability_assessment_before_controls.rationale: Practitioners frequently hand over to colleagues; availability not always checked
probability_assessment_before_controls.frequency_estimate: Could occur weekly across user base

initial_risk_evaluation.calculation: S3 x P4 = ALARP per risk matrix

existing_controls.effectiveness_rationale: Validates state but not practitioner availability

probability_assessment_after_controls.rationale: State validation reduces some error cases but availability gap remains

residual_risk_evaluation.calculation: S3 x P3 = ALARP per risk matrix

benefit_risk_analysis.clinical_benefit: Enables efficient care coordination, reduces time to handover, maintains continuity of care
benefit_risk_analysis.benefit_justification: Manual handover processes are slower and more error-prone. Digital handover, even with this residual risk, improves overall care coordination.
benefit_risk_analysis.disclosure_text: Users should verify target practitioner availability before initiating handover. System does not validate real-time availability.
